name: dashboard-reskin
description: DashboardScreen reskin: search bar with Search icon, amber tab bar (active: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/20; inactive: text-on-surface-variant), section headers text-[10px] font-bold text-primary uppercase tracking-widest, map cards bg-surface-container-low rounded-xl border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/20, owner badge bg-primary-container, PWA install prompt sticky at bottom with amber install button, FAB at bottom-20 to clear PWA bar.
